summary: R.7 Construction Cashflow Tab Cleanup - All frontend tests PASSED. Verified role-based read-only logic: super_admin can edit (form enabled, save button visible, no readonly notice), admin/accounting can view only (form disabled, no save button, readonly notice present), sales cannot see tab at all. .gitignore cleanup verified (90 lines, no duplicates, no -e lines).

minor.issue: Endpoint documented in test_credentials.md but does not exist in backend. Had to create test users directly in database for testing.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) when switching tabs - minor visual issue, charts still render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: ConstructionCashflowTab.jsx: Correctly implements useIsSuperAdmin() hook to determine canEdit. fieldset disabled={!canEdit} properly disables all form inputs. Save button conditionally rendered only when canEdit=true. Readonly notice with data-testid='construction-readonly-notice' correctly shown when !canEdit.
auth.jsx: useIsSuperAdmin() correctly returns true only when user.role === 'super_admin'.
AdminDashboard.jsx: tab-construction visibility controlled by isFinanceVisible (from backend is_finance_visible), not by role directly - this is correct as backend handles role-based visibility.
.gitignore: Clean file with 90 lines, no duplicate entries, no -e lines, uses general patterns (*.pack) instead of specific file names.
seed_data_creation: Created test_admin@begestates.bg (role=admin) and test_accounting@begestates.bg (role=accounting) directly in MongoDB for testing read-only behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.7 Construction Cashflow Tab read-only logic fully tested. Key test points: (1) super_admin: tab visible, form editable, save button exists, no readonly notice, (2) admin: tab visible, form disabled (fieldset disabled), no save button, readonly notice with text 'Само super_admin може да редактира строителната прогноза.' and data-testid='construction-readonly-notice', (3) accounting: same as admin (read-only), (4) sales: tab-construction NOT in DOM. .gitignore cleanup verified: 90 lines, no duplicates, no -e lines, no specific *.pack filenames.

verified_features.feature: super_admin: all 7 tabs visible (overview, sales, finance, calendar, clients, unsold, construction)
admin: construction-form visible but DISABLED (fieldset disabled)
admin: construction-readonly-notice EXISTS with correct text
accounting: construction-readonly-notice EXISTS with correct text
sales: tab-construction does NOT exist in DOM
Regression: all 7 tabs clickable and load for super_admin
Construction tab: KPI cards (8 cards) render correctly
Construction tab: monthly table renders correctly
.gitignore cleanup: uses general *.pack pattern instead of specific filenames
